About.title: About
About.heading: We build tomorrow's digital tools.
About.mission_text: FoxCase is a digital agency that supports professionals and individuals in the design, development and deployment of their digital projects. From strategy to production, we cover the entire digital value chain.
About.approach_text: Every project is unique. We favour a custom, transparent and iterative approach. No generic templates, no off-the-shelf solutions. Clean code, solid architectures and design that serves the product.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Clear communication, no unnecessary jargon, visible deliverables at every step.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Clean code, solid architectures, automated testing. We don't cut corners.

custom.title: Custom
custom.description: Every project is unique. No templates, no off-the-shelf solutions.

commitment.title: Commitment
commitment.description: We invest in every project as if it were our own. Post-delivery support included.

About.foxstudio_text: Our R&D lab explores cutting-edge technologies: AI, real-time 3D, edge computing. Today's innovations become tomorrow's solutions.

Lab.title: FoxStudio
Lab.mission_text: FoxStudio is FoxCase's R&D laboratory. This is where tomorrow's innovations are born: artificial intelligence, real-time 3D, edge computing, immersive interfaces. What is explored in the Lab ends up enriching the solutions we offer our clients.
Lab.filiation_text: FoxCase delivers. FoxStudio explores. The two entities feed each other: the agency's field constraints guide the Lab's research, and the Lab's discoveries push the boundaries of what the agency can offer.
Lab.see_projects_subtitle: Explore experiments, prototypes and ongoing innovations.
